Visible cells containing the text 'DETERIORATING' next to specific lines of business in the 'Performance_Summary' sheet.

integrity.description: Agent used a spreadsheet GUI application (e.g., Excel, LibreOffice Calc) to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show an actual spreadsheet application interface, not a terminal window running Python/Pandas scripts.

integrity.description: Agent used formulas for calculations rather than hardcoding values.
integrity.visual_evidence: When a calculated cell is selected, the formula bar shows a spreadsheet formula (e.g., starting with '=') rather than a static number or text.

integrity.description: Agent did not simply paste a pre-made table or text block into the spreadsheet.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show progressive calculation, formatting, or formula entry, indicating genuine interaction with the spreadsheet cells.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task explicitly requires formulas for all calculations. Verify that the agent uses spreadsheet formulas (visible in the formula bar) rather than hardcoding the results. The underlying data values are synthetic, so focus on the presence of correct formula structures (e.g., IF statements for flags, average/CAGR formulas) rather than specific expected numbers.
